trivia_bullets.text: Green Flash Aura common (MKM, no. 149, February 9, 2024). Card name directly invokes the legal alibi concept; top-down genre-to-mechanic translation.

Suspect mechanic: grants menace but prevents blocking. Airtight Alibi removes Suspect status and permanently prevents enchanted creature from being suspected again — one of the cleanest Suspect counters in the set.
sources: coolstuffinc.com: Mechanics of MKM — Suspect article

trivia_bullets.text: MKM design team built mechanics top-down from murder-mystery genre vocabulary: 'Alibi' as mechanic name was chosen to embody investigative narrative before the card mechanics were finalized.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Murders at Karlov Manor Mechanics

trivia_bullets.text: {2}{G} Flash, +2/+2, hexproof until EOT, untap on enter — relevant tempo play in Limited at common rarity.
